description: A chemical company has developed a new experimental refrigerant ('HFC-Experimental') not listed in standard databases. Model this emission and update the TRACI 2.1 method to account for its Global Warming Potential (GWP). Create an elementary flow named 'HFC-Experimental' (Emission to air) and a process named 'HFC Leakage Test' that outputs 1.0 kg of this flow. Create an impact assessment method named 'TRACI 2.1 Expanded' that includes a characterization factor of 2300 kg CO2 eq for 'HFC-Experimental' under the Global Warming Air category. Perform an LCIA for the 'HFC Leakage Test' using the 'TRACI 2.1 Expanded' method and export the results table to '~/LCA_Results/hfc_impact_result.csv'.
